name: plan-sync-tasks
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>plan>review>audit |
 scope: paths(plans/IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md,plans/TASKS.md) |
 policy: evidence,correctness-first,quality-gates{tests,docs,security},safety-gates,approval-gates{explicit,no-fallback},deterministic-output |
 lens: hickey-carmack |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: SELECTED_TASK_IDS
required_inputs.description: Explicit task ids selected for the current run.

required_inputs.name: KNOWN_EVIDENCE
required_inputs.description: Tests, logs, diffs, or prior outputs that support task progress.

required_inputs.name: IMPLEMENTATION_EVIDENCE_NOTES
required_inputs.description: Implementation-local evidence notes emitted by $build-write-code before markdown synchronization.
